reviews.comment:
These guys know what they’re doing!!!

I originally scheduled them for a weekday but the morning of the move the forecast showed non-stop rain. I asked if they could reschedule. They immediately got back to me and rescheduled for the weekend-no problem!  I also had more boxes than I originally thought I would- so they offered to bring a third mover. I’m so glad I agreed, and that they were able to be flexible with my needs. It made a huge difference.

They’re friendly, extremely helpful, and made the moving process way less stressful. I’m honestly so impressed with their service. They showed up right on time and got to work right away.

I’m an artist moving into a one bedroom. They took apart my heavy 6ft long electric standing desk for me and helped me get it back together at the new place. I have a lot of heavy art supplies, big easels, papers, paints, etc. that I was initially worried about having movers handle. Once I saw them start moving things I wasn’t worried at all- they knew exactly how to pack the truck so my things were safe. They were able move everything carefully and successfully into my new place in just under 2.5 hours and for a very reasonable price!

I can’t recommend Comfort Moving Chicago enough! I’ll be telling everyone I know to use them. Thanks again guys!!!

reviewReply.comment: Really appreciate the detailed review, means a lot. Glad we could help make your 1-bedroom move go smoothly. We are always happy to help here in Chicago!

reviews.comment: We used Comfort Moving to move out of our 2 bedroom apartment and into our new 3 bedroom today and I cannot imagine using anybody us for our next move. reviews.comment: They were 5 hours late, broke the handles off of my storage boxes, left a box at my previous apartment building (to which I no longer had a key), and 5/6 of them did not even acknowledge me when I thanked them and said goodbye. Not very professional all around.

reviews.comment: I learned of Comfort Moving Chicago from a reddit post while seeking movers for a split move over NYE/NY.  Mateo was able to provide me with a quote on the first call and we scheduled shortly thereafter.  Henry and Nate were my movers for both days between the Arcadia Terrace and Ravenswood neighborhoods, and they were communicative, considerate, and professional to work with.  We were able to work through issues with my bed frame (from previous movers) and they worked efficiently and really well together.  All around great communication and energy from everyone from start to finish and I will absolutely be recommending and using Comfort Moving going forward!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the great review! We’re glad we could provide clear communication, fair pricing, and a smooth moving experience for your split move between Arcadia Terrace and Ravenswood. It’s great to hear our team worked efficiently and professionally from start to finish. We truly appreciate the recommendation and look forward to helping with any future moves in Chicago.

reviews.comment: I recently hired Comfort Moving Chicago after a close friend of mine recommended them to me. They moved super fast and handled our items with care. The team was very organized and they made it easy to schedule my move. This was the best moving experience that I’ve ever had!

reviewReply.comment:
Thank you so much for choosing Comfort Moving Chicago and for sharing your experience! We’re thrilled to hear that our team made your move between homes smooth, fast, and stress-free. Providing friendly, professional, and efficient service is exactly what we aim for with every move.

Our movers work hard to stay organized, protect your belongings, and make scheduling easy for families across Chicago, so feedback like yours means a lot to us. We’re grateful for the referral and honored to be your go-to moving company.

If you ever need help with a future move, furniture delivery, or anything else, we’ll be here for you!
